behavior_history.name: Behavior History
behavior_history.description: Repeated actions and historical events are stronger than self-explanation.

observer_feedback.name: Observer Feedback
observer_feedback.description: External witnesses reduce blind spots in self-report.

structured_facts.name: Structured Facts
structured_facts.description: Assets, roles, health, environment, and network fields are grounded state variables.

self_report.name: Self Report
self_report.description: Self-description is useful but may include identity stories and blind spots.

aspiration_fear.name: Aspiration And Fear
aspiration_fear.description: Desired and feared futures reveal direction, but not always behavior.

model_inference.name: Model Inference
model_inference.description: Weakest evidence: useful only when supported by stronger sources.
